primary_sources.coverage_note: Historical data dates back to 1946 and electronic data is available from 1980 forward.
primary_sources.why_it_matches_phase7: Matches the paper's stated AHA annual-survey source and the required 1980-1986 hospital panel window.

primary_sources.eligibility: Access is limited to NBER-affiliated faculty projects; graduate students must work with Health Forum or the AHA directly.
primary_sources.delivery: NBER IT prepares variable/year extracts on its secure servers under the AHA license agreement.
primary_sources.why_it_matches_phase7: Still uses the same AHA Annual Survey source, so it preserves the paper's empirical source chain.

public_substitutes.gap_note: Useful for later hospital panels, but it starts after the paper's 1980-1986 design window and cannot recreate the published Medicare PPS sample contract.
A cleaned public wrapper around HCRIS, but it inherits the same post-1995 start date and therefore cannot deliver paper-level parity.
